title: garuleum album
intro: Garuleum album, also known as Leuzea carthamoides, is a perennial plant native to Central Asia and Europe, known for its edible flowers and roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate stress. The health benefits of Garuleum album include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety, and enhanced physical performance, making it a popular herbal remedy among athletes. Herbal preparations of Garuleum album can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can also be consumed as a dried root or flower supplement.
